creator: ardovm@yahoo.it
text:
Created attachment 165819
Integration of upstream SVN commits

This contains the following changes:

 1- upstream SVN commit 1724971, following Damjan's advice from comment #2;

 2- fix to a mis-interpretation of the "IsRelative" option inside Mozilla profile files (this is pending review from upstream);

 3- PORTREVISION bump.

Parts 1- and 2- are inside a single patch file, to be created into the files/ directory.
